mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.target_type AS targetType, r.target_id AS targetId, r.user_id AS userId, u.login_id AS loginId, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM replies r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.target_type = #{targetType} AND r.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO replies (target_type, target_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE replies SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
